title: Anacamptis × sciathia
taxonomy: Anacamptis × sciathia is a hybrid species of orchid, classified within the genus Anacamptis. This genus is part of the orchid subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the subfamily, Anacamptis is placed in the tribe Orchideae, which is one of the most diverse and widespread groups of orchids. The tribe Orchideae is further divided into several subtribes, with Anacamptis being part of the Orchidinae subtribe. As a hybrid species, Anacamptis × sciathia's classification is primarily based on its parent species.

intro: Anacamptis × sciathia, also known as the hybrid green orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Anacamptis × sciathia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
